creator: dev@submerge.ch
text:
Created attachment 254816
Update Ardour to 8.10.0 release, make boost a build dependency.

Ok, 8.10.0 seems to stick, no more hotfix releases until now ;-)

Update patch for Ardour 8.10.0, incorporate the change to make boost a build dependency (thanks Vladimir). Tested on 14.1-RELEASE amd64.
